source_name: Prescription of Recognized Professional Body under section 433(5) of the CA 2016
section: Companies Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister, in consultation with the Minister charged
section_title: Companies Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister, in consultation with the Minister charged
content:
with the responsibility for finance, prescribes the Malaysian Institute of Accountants and
the Malaysian Institute of Certified Public Accountants to be recognized professional
bodies with effect from 15 March 2018.
